MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
JOSH S. BROWNSTEIN, ESQ. OF BROWNSTEIN THOMAS, LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR PLAINTIFFS CHRISTINE ELI, ZENA PSYCHIC CLAIRVOYANT, LLC AND SAMMY JOHNSON).

APPEARANCES: Josh S. Brownstein, Esq. of Brownstein Thomas LLP 986-1338 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltfs; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as moving party provided courtesy copy of motion including a proof of service. Upon further review, the Court found good cause and granted the motion. Moving party will submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
